lines.speaker: Gerald
lines.text: Good day to you traveller, are you here to fish or just looking around? I've caught some beauties down here.

lines.speaker: Gerald
lines.text: The last one was this big!

sections.title: After learning about the treasure during the Waterfall Quest

lines.speaker: Gerald
lines.text: Hello traveller. Are you here to fish or to hunt for treasure?

lines.speaker: Gerald
lines.text: Adventurers pass through here every week, they never find anything though.
